name: Priority Tradelines
description_short: Priority Tradelines sells authorized user credit tradelines—adding existing accounts with perfect payment histories to your credit report to boost scores within weeks.
description_long:
Priority Tradelines was established in 2016 and is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas. The company claims over 12 years of expertise in the financial industry, though this timeline appears inconsistent with its 2016 founding date. They operate exclusively in the credit enhancement space, focusing solely on personal credit enhancement and explicitly declining to offer business tradelines or credit repair services.

The company's core offering is the sale of authorized user tradelines—adding consumers as authorized users on established credit accounts with perfect payment histories, low balances, and excellent standing. According to their marketing, these tradelines post to all three credit bureaus and deliver score increases within weeks. Their stated service applications include mortgage and real estate approvals, auto loans, access to personal and business loans, interest rate reduction, refinancing, building credit, and lower auto insurance rates.

Priority Tradelines distinguishes itself through a 5-star Google rating, claims of 90% customer recommendation rate, and testimonials highlighting reliable posting and responsive customer service. They emphasize secure payment options, SSL encryption for personal data, and a straightforward 6-step ordering process requiring driver's license, Social Security card, and payment submission. The company maintains regular business hours (Monday-Friday, 10am-7pm CST) and offers consultation scheduling.

A critical caveat: while the website presents tradelines as a legitimate credit-building tool, the legality and ethics of authorized user tradelines remain contested. Selling access to established accounts—particularly "piggybacking"—operates in a gray zone; some accounts are legitimately family members' accounts, while others may involve accounts purchased specifically for resale. The FTC and credit bureaus have scrutinized this practice. Consumers should understand that adding authorized users to boost scores is not the same as building credit through genuine financial behavior, and lenders increasingly screen for this practice.

For consumers building or rebuilding credit, the landscape includes several complementary tools. Secured credit cards require a deposit but report to all three bureaus, establishing payment history. Credit builder loans work similarly, holding funds in a savings account while you make payments. Rent reporting services can add on-time housing payments to credit files. For those with damaged credit, credit repair services address inaccurate negative items, while credit monitoring services track progress over time. Consumers with existing debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments and reduce utilization. A small installment loan with on-time payments reported to all three bureaus is one of the most effective ways to build a credit history from scratch.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

tiers.name: Credit Building Program
features: Reports to all three credit bureaus

pros: Claims accounts post to all three credit bureaus, often earlier than expected posting dates
5-star Google rating and documented customer testimonials citing reliability
Straightforward 6-step ordering process with clear documentation requirements
Responsive customer service with named representative (Robert) mentioned in reviews
SSL encryption and secure payment options for personal data protection
Low utilization rates and perfect payment histories guaranteed on offered accounts
Wide range of stated applications (mortgages, auto loans, refinancing, business loans)
cons: Core service (authorized user tradelines) operates in legal gray area; FTC and credit bureaus have scrutinized this practice
Inconsistency in company background: claims 'over 12 years expertise' but established in 2016
No transparency on pricing, account selection criteria, or posting timelines on publicly viewable content
Risk that lenders increasingly screen for and reject applications bolstered by purchased authorized user accounts
Building credit through tradelines is artificial credit inflation, not genuine credit history development
best_for: Consumers with very limited credit history seeking quick score improvements for mortgage/auto loan qualification
Individuals with damaged credit who need rapid score recovery before major financial applications
Borrowers actively preparing for home or vehicle purchases within weeks to months
diagnosis: Priority Tradelines is best for consumers who need rapid credit score improvement for imminent mortgage, auto, or personal loan applications and understand they are purchasing temporary authorized user status rather than building genuine credit history. The main caveat is that authorized user tradelines exist in legal gray area; lenders increasingly screen for and reject applications enhanced this way, and this service does not constitute real credit building.
services: Authorized user credit tradelines for personal credit enhancement
Client consultation and credit profile assessment
Secure payment processing with SSL encryption
Documentation upload and verification (driver's license, Social Security card)
Credit score boost guidance for specific financial goals
Tradeline removal assistance (implied through order process)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
